prompt: Comic book page layout, 3:4 ratio. Title: "5 tips for a good Friday" 5 panels with consistent character throughout. Warm, gentle lighting. Panel 1: Character drinking coffee by a window, golden morning light. Caption: "Friday mornings are for breathing. The rest can wait." Panel 2: Character sending a message to a friend, sincere smiles. Caption: "One kind word can carry someone through the whole weekend." Panel 3: Character drawing or creating, absorbed in the moment. Caption: "You don't need to finish it. You just need to start." Panel 4: Character walking outside, hands in pockets, looking up at trees and sky. Caption: "The world is still beautiful. You just have to look up." Panel 5: Character peaceful, soft lighting, quiet smile. Caption: "You made it through another week. That's enough. That's everything."
